# Codex Test Specs

This appendix initializes the test backlog from the handoff evidence plan.

No result is recorded here unless a test has actually been implemented and run.

| Layer | Test spec | Implementation status | Result status |
|---|---|---|---|
| Alignment | Constitutional consistency | planned | not run |
| Alignment | Value conflict classification | planned | not run |
| Alignment | Self-modification ethics scenario | planned | not run |
| Alignment | Power-seeking / agency-dominance scenario | planned | not run |
| SCF | Qualification predicates | planned | not run |
| SCF | Route validity | planned | not run |
| SCF | Mutation | planned | not run |
| SCF | Authority non-escalation | planned | not run |
| SCF | Rollback and recovery | planned | not run |
| Planning | Decomposition accuracy | planned | not run |
| Planning | Dependency ordering | planned | not run |
| Planning | Constraint preservation | planned | not run |
| Planning | Runtime replanning | planned | not run |
| Planning | Tool selection | planned | not run |
| Planning | Budget and risk allocation | planned | not run |
| Planning | Scope creep prevention | planned | not run |
| VCM | Context packet adequacy | planned | not run |
| VCM | Distractor resistance | planned | not run |
| VCM | Authority label preservation | planned | not run |
| VCM | Proof-carrying summary fidelity | planned | not run |
| VCM | Planner-guided prefetch accuracy | planned | not run |
| VCM | Privacy / behavioral authority checks | planned | not run |
| Talos / execution | Typed job lifecycle | planned | not run |
| Talos / execution | Tool permission enforcement | planned | not run |
| Talos / execution | Audit log reconstruction | planned | not run |
| Talos / execution | Replay determinism | planned | not run |
| Talos / execution | Human approval gates | planned | not run |
| Talos / execution | Adversarial job injection | planned | not run |
| Spinoza / verification | Claim extraction | planned | not run |
| Spinoza / verification | Contradiction detection | planned | not run |
| Spinoza / verification | Belief revision | planned | not run |
| Spinoza / verification | Evidence tier assignment | planned | not run |
| Spinoza / verification | Uncertainty calibration | planned | not run |
| Spinoza / verification | Refusal or silence when evidence is insufficient | planned | not run |
| Routing / modularity | Specialist routing accuracy | planned | not run |
| Routing / modularity | Readiness gate enforcement | planned | not run |
| Routing / modularity | Benchmark promotion | planned | not run |
| Routing / modularity | Quarantine | planned | not run |
| Routing / modularity | Regression preservation | planned | not run |
| Routing / modularity | Residual escrow | planned | not run |
| Compression | Reconstruction quality | planned | not run |
| Compression | Residual burden | planned | not run |
| Compression | Probe-and-route fallback | planned | not run |
| Compression | Compression ratio | planned | not run |
| Compression | Latency cost | planned | not run |
| Compression | Downstream utility preservation | planned | not run |
| Benchmark ratchets | Saturation detection | planned | not run |
| Benchmark ratchets | Hidden benchmark transfer | planned | not run |
| Benchmark ratchets | Regression generation | planned | not run |
| Benchmark ratchets | Anti-Goodhart checks | planned | not run |
| Benchmark ratchets | Residual backlog integrity | planned | not run |
